productDisplayName: Vans unisex Old Skool Red Casual Shoes
description: Old Skool from vans in striking red, black and white: a lace up shoe giving you the durability and comfort you expect from the brand alongside a classic style developed over nearly 50 years of shoe making. Channel the cool vibes of the 1960s with this stylish shoe. Upper Suede uppers over the forefoot, tongue and heel cup for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added comfort and reinforcement Padded collar and textile lining for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
